segments.text: Listen, my sons, to a father's instruction; pay attention and gain understanding.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: I give you sound learning, so do not forsake my teaching.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For I too was a son to my father, still tender, and cherished by my mother.
Then he taught me, and he said to me,
Take hold of my words with all your heart; keep my commands, and you will live.
segments.speaker: Solomon's Father

segments.text: Get wisdom, get understanding; do not forget my words or turn away from them.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Do not forsake wisdom, and she will protect you; love her, and she will watch over you.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The beginning of wisdom is this: Get wisdom. Though it cost all you have, get understanding.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Cherish her, and she will exalt you; embrace her, and she will honor you.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: She will give you a garland to grace your head and present you with a glorious crown.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Listen, my son, accept what I say, and the years of your life will be many.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: I instruct you in the way of wisdom and lead you along straight paths.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: When you walk, your steps will not be hampered; when you run, you will not stumble.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Hold on to instruction, do not let it go; guard it well, for it is your life.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Do not set foot on the path of the wicked or walk in the way of evildoers.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Avoid it, do not travel on it; turn from it and go on your way.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For they cannot rest until they do evil; they are robbed of sleep till they make someone stumble.
They eat the bread of wickedness and drink the wine of violence.
The path of the righteous is like the morning sun, shining ever brighter till the full light of day.
But the way of the wicked is like deep darkness; they do not know what makes them stumble.
My son, pay attention to what I say; turn your ear to my words.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Do not let them out of your sight, keep them within your heart;
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: for they are life to those who find them and health to one's whole body.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Above all else, guard your heart, for everything you do flows from it.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Keep your mouth free of perversity; keep corrupt talk far from your lips.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Let your eyes look straight ahead; fix your gaze directly before you.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Give careful thought to the paths for your feet and be steadfast in all your ways.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Do not turn to the right or the left; keep your foot from evil.
segments.speaker: Solomon
